visual_summary: Animated text displays blur animation when text is displayed with a delay. Use this component when you want to create visually appealing animated text. It is also suitable for displaying text that requires users' attention.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Animate Demo 7
Description: Animated text displays blur animation when text is displayed with a delay. Use this component when you want to create visually appealing animated text. It is also suitable for displaying text that requires users' attention.
Style: blur, animated
Interactions: animated
Tags: animation, text, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextAnimate } from "@/registry/magicui/text-animate"

export default function TextAnimateDemo7() {
  return (
    <TextAnimate animation="blurInUp" by="character" delay={2}>
      Blur in by character
    </TextAnimate>
  )
}
